lines.english: When the unstruck sound current resounds, doubt and fear run away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੇਰੀ ਤੂ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਤਾ ਦਰਿ ਸੋਹੈ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: sabh teree too guramukh jaataa dar sohai gun gaaeidaa |10|
lines.english: All belong to You; to the Gurmukhs, You are known. Singing Your Praises, they look beautiful in Your Court. ||10||
God is all-pervading, giving shade to all.
He is the Primal Lord, immaculate and pure.
I know of no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੰਕਾਰੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਗਰਬੁ ਗਵਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: ekankaar vasai man bhaavai haumai garab gavaaeidaa |11|
lines.english: The One Universal Creator Lord dwells within, and is pleasing to the mind of those who banishe egotism and pride. ||11||
I drink in the Ambrosial Nectar, given by the True Guru.
I do not know any other second or third.
Spiritual wisdom and meditation on the True Lord are deep and profound.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਏਕੁ ਸੁ ਅਪਰ ਪਰੰਪਰੁ ਪਰਖਿ ਖਜਾਨੈ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: eko ek su apar paranpar parakh khajaanai paaeidaa |12|
lines.english: He is the One, Unique, Infinite and Endless Lord; He evaluates all beings and places some in His treasury. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਤੀ ਹੈ ਤੇਤੀ ਤੁਧੁ ਜਾਚੈ ਕਰਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੋ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: jetee hai tetee tudh jaachai karam milai so paaeidaa |13|
lines.english: All that are, beg from You; You are attained only by Your Grace. ||13||
No one knows Your expanse.
You hold karma and Dharma in Your hands, O True Lord.
O Independent Lord, Your treasures are inexhaustible.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਕਿਰਪਾਲੁ ਸਦਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: too deaal kirapaal sadaa prabh aape mel milaaeidaa |14|
lines.english: You are forever kind and compassionate, God. You unite in Your Union. ||14||
You Yourself establish, and You Yourself disestablish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜੋੜਿ ਵਿਛੋੜੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਮਾਰਿ ਜੀਵਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: aape jorr vichhorre karataa aape maar jeevaaeidaa |15|
lines.english: The Creator Himself unites and separates; He Himself kills and rejuvenates. ||15||
You Yourself see, and cause Yourself to be seen.
As much as there is, is contained within You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਾਚੁ ਕਹੈ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੬॥੧॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: naanak saach kahai benantee har darasan sukh paaeidaa |16|1|13|
lines.english: Nanak offers this true prayer; gazing upon the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan, I have found peace. ||16||1||13||
You gaze upon Your creation, sitting within Your royal palace.
In loving devotional worship, O True Lord, I sing Your Glorious Praises.
If I am pleasing to You, Lord, then I obtain the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan.
Maaroo, First Mehl:
The devotees look beautiful in the Darbaar, the Court of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਣੇ ਤੂ ਭਾਵਹਿ ਕਰਤੇ ਆਪੇ ਰਸਨ ਰਸਾਇਦਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tudh bhaane too bhaaveh karate aape rasan rasaaeidaa |1|
lines.english: By Your Will, O Creator Lord, You have become pleasing to me, and so sweet to my tongue. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ਤੇਰੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਦਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aap gavaae terai rang raate anadin naam dhiaaeidaa |2|
lines.english: Eradicating self-conceit, they are attuned to Your Love; night and day, they meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||2||
Shiva, Brahma, gods and goddesses,
Your slaves, Lord, are liberated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤੀ ਸਤੀ ਕੇਤੇ ਬਨਵਾਸੀ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jatee satee kete banavaasee ant na koee paaeidaa |3|
lines.english: Celibates, givers of charity and the many forest-dwellers have not found the Lord's limits. ||3||
Indra, ascetics and silent sages serve You.
No one knows You, unless You let them know You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਆਪਣ ਭਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh kare su aapan bhaanai |
lines.english: Whatever is done, is by Your Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਜੀਅ ਉਪਾਏ ਭਾਣੈ ਸਾਹ ਲਵਾਇਦਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh jeea upaae bhaanai saah lavaaeidaa |4|
lines.english: You created the 8.4 million species of beings; by Your Will, they draw their breath. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਨਿਹਚਉ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai so nihchau hovai |
lines.english: Whatever is pleasing to Your Will, undoubtedly comes to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਵਹੁ ਭੁਲਾ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਪਾਏ ਆਇ ਜਾਇ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naavahu bhulaa tthaur na paae aae jaae dukh paaeidaa |5|
lines.english: Forgetting the Name, he finds no place of rest; coming and going in reincarnation, he suffers in pain. ||5||
The self-willed manmukh shows off, and comes to grief.
within it is the immaculate essence of the Naam.
Pure is the body, and immaculate is the swan-soul;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲੇ ਦੂਖ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਕਰਿ ਪੀਵੈ ਬਾਹੁੜਿ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sagale dookh amrit kar peevai baahurr dookh na paaeidaa |6|
lines.english: Such a being drinks in all his pains like Ambrosial Nectar; he never suffers sorrow again. ||6||
For his excessive indulgences, he receives only pain;
from his enjoyments, he contracts diseases, and in the end, he wastes away.
Without spiritual wisdom, they all just wander around.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਖਹੁ ਸੋਗੁ ਨ ਮਿਟਈ ਕਬਹੂ ਵਿਣੁ ਭਾਣੇ ਭਰਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: harakhahu sog na mittee kabahoo vin bhaane bharamaaeidaa |7|
lines.english: His pleasure can never erase his pain; without accepting the Lord's Will, he wanders lost and confused. ||7||
The True Lord is pervading and permeating everywhere, lovingly engaged.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਭਉ ਸਬਦੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਸਚੁ ਜਾਤਾ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: nirbhau sabad guroo sach jaataa jotee jot milaaeidaa |8|
lines.english: The Fearless Lord is known through the Shabad, the Word of the True Guru; one's light merges into the Light. ||8||
He is the eternal, unchanging, immeasurable Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਰੇਖਿਆ ਮਿਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਭੇਦਿ ਪਤੀਆਇਦਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: roop na rekhiaa mit nahee keemat sabad bhed pateeaeidaa |9|
lines.english: He has no form or shape, no limit or value. Pierced by the Shabad, one is satisfied. ||9||
In an instant, He destroys, ang then reconstructs.
